subject: Lightning Energy, a yellow orb with a lightning bolt symbol on a radiant yellow background
description: A large yellow-gold orb bearing a black lightning bolt symbol is centered on a radiant yellow background. White rays of light emanate from behind the orb, giving it a glowing, electric quality. The symbol is the classic Pokemon lightning-type icon — a bold zigzag bolt. The entire image is monochromatic in yellows and whites, conveying sharp electric energy. The design is graphic and symbolic.
foreground: large yellow orb with black lightning bolt symbol, radiating white light
